narrative:
Huntington Twp township has 1,529 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points.
